mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bpm_node_instance ( T_DAY, SCENE_ID, NODE_TYPE_ID, TITLE, STATUS, TIME_POINT, PRIORITY, progress, DUE_DATE, PLANNED_START, PLANNED_END, CUSTOM_FIELD_SCHEME_ID, FIELD_SCHEME_DATA, DESCRIPTION, Org_code, org_name, ORG_BRANCH, ORG_BRANCH_NAME, ORG_CEN_BRANCH, ORG_CEN_BRANCH_NAME, ORG_BUSI_BRANCH, ORG_BUSI_BRANCH_NAME, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, channel, node_code, data_org_level ) VALUES
( #{item.tDay}, #{item.sceneId}, #{item.nodeTypeId}, #{item.title}, #{item.status}, #{item.timePoint}, #{item.priority}, #{item.progress}, #{item.dueDate}, #{item.plannedStart}, #{item.plannedEnd}, #{item.customFieldSchemeId}, #{item.fieldSchemeData}, #{item.description}, #{item.orgCode}, #{item.orgName}, #{item.orgBranch}, #{item.orgBranchName}, #{item.orgCenBranch}, #{item.orgCenBranchName}, #{item.orgBusiBranch}, #{item.orgBusiBranchName}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.channel}, #{item.nodeCode}, #{item.dataOrgLevel} )
